name: Modern Classic
description: A clean modern layout with bold headings and subtle accent color for clarity.

name: Classic Minimal
description: A refined classic resume style with soft contrast and elegant spacing.

name: Bold Creative
description: A strong design with color highlights, bold sections and a modern presentation.

name: Professional Executive
description: Sophisticated design perfect for senior positions with clean typography and professional colors.

name: Creative Designer
description: Vibrant and artistic layout ideal for creative professionals with bold colors and modern fonts.

name: Minimalist Clean
description: Ultra-clean design focusing on content with minimal visual elements and plenty of white space.

name: Academic Scholar
description: Traditional academic format with emphasis on education and research achievements.

name: Tech Innovator
description: Modern tech-focused design with sleek lines and innovative color schemes.

name: Corporate Professional
description: Conservative corporate style perfect for traditional business environments.

name: Startup Founder
description: Dynamic and energetic design for entrepreneurs with bold colors and modern typography.

name: Elegant Sophisticated
description: Refined and luxurious design with elegant fonts and sophisticated color palette.

name: Vibrant Dynamic
description: Energetic and lively design with bright colors and dynamic visual elements.

name: Timeless Traditional
description: Classic and enduring design that never goes out of style.

name: Futuristic Modern
description: Cutting-edge design with futuristic elements and innovative layouts.

name: Warm Inviting
description: Cozy and approachable design with warm colors and friendly typography.

name: Cool Contemporary
description: Sleek and modern design with cool tones and contemporary styling.

name: Artistic Creative
description: Highly creative and artistic layout perfect for creative professionals.

name: Structured Organized
description: Well-organized and structured design with clear sections and logical flow.

name: Playful Fun
description: Lighthearted and fun design with playful elements and cheerful colors.

name: Serious Professional
description: Serious and professional design for formal business environments.

name: Innovative Cutting Edge
description: Innovative and cutting-edge design pushing the boundaries of resume design.

name: Balanced Harmonious
description: Well-balanced design with harmonious colors and proportional elements.

name: Striking Bold
description: Bold and striking design that commands attention and makes an impact.

name: Subtle Refined
description: Subtle and refined design with elegant details and sophisticated styling.

name: Energetic Vibrant
description: Energetic and vibrant design full of life and dynamic visual elements.

name: Calm Serene
description: Calm and serene design promoting peace and clarity of thought.

name: Powerful Impactful
description: Powerful and impactful design that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Unique Distinctive
description: Unique and distinctive design that stands out from the crowd.

name: Versatile Adaptable
description: Versatile and adaptable design that works across different industries.

name: Memorable Unforgettable
description: Memorable and unforgettable design that stays in the mind long after viewing.
